keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $735.59 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $743.56 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $735.59 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: NFLX PUT — enter $2.98–$3.30, target $4.71+, stop $1.88.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.68% and SPY -0.43%. Composite sentiment -23 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation, spy trend. VIX at 15.02 (+0.05%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Financials (+1.39%) is leading while Communication (-4.31%) lags. Premarket strength in JPM, COIN; weakness in GOOGL, PLTR. The desk's highest-conviction setup is NFLX (7.1/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
